rows.description: Soluta Scholari. Servis Regis Car. 1mi
rows.notes: Visually verified. Overrode both extractors' descriptions. The word is 'Servis' (not 'Semi') and the punctuation is a period (not a colon or comma). Although faint, the reading is clear upon close inspection.

rows.description: Soluta varia
rows.notes: Consensus reached on description and row_type by both extractors, visually confirmed.

rows.description: 1792 Nov 6 - Coll: Subscrip to Rad: Infirmary for a Year
rows.notes: Amounts are consensual and visually confirmed. Description from gemini-flash is more accurate, including 'Nov', 'Coll:', 'Subscrip', and 'Rad:' with colons, matching the image.
rows.english_description: Subscription to the Radcliffe Infirmary for one year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Subscription to the Radcliffe Infirmary for one year, amounting to £5 5s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts are consensual and visually confirmed. Description from gemini-flash is more accurate, correctly including the date '8 -'.
rows.english_description: Payment to H. Richards on behalf of the French clergy.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to H. Richards on behalf of the French clergy, amounting to £21 0s 0d.

rows.description: 8 - 3 Months Tax to St.Mic. Parish. The Cooling
rows.notes: Amounts are consensual and visually confirmed. Description from gemini-flash is more accurate, correctly reading '3 Months' (not '8 Months') and 'The Cooling' (not 'Tho Cowling').
rows.english_description: Payment of three months' parish tax to St Michael's parish for The Cooling.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of three months' parish tax to St Michael's parish for The Cooling, amounting to £0 7s 8d.

rows.description: 20 - To Teazler for plastering &c. as per bill
rows.notes: Amounts are consensual and visually confirmed. Description from gemini-flash is more accurate, including the date '20 -' and the name 'Teazler' (not 'Taylor').
rows.english_description: Payment to Teazler for plastering and other work as per the bill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Teazler for plastering and other work as per the bill, amounting to £25 9s 4d.

rows.description: 21 - To Bolton for plumbing.
rows.notes: Pounds, shillings, and pence_whole are consensual. The pence fraction is visually confirmed as '3/4' (0.75), aligning with gemini-flash's interpretation and detailed note explaining the stylized '3/4' notation. Description from gemini-flash including the date '21 -' is accurate.
rows.english_description: Payment to Bolton for plumbing work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Bolton for plumbing work, amounting to £34 4s 6 3/4d.

rows.description: 24 - To Mr. Steph. Townsend, paving &c.
rows.notes: Visually confirmed description and amounts. gemini-flash correctly identified the amounts as '7 8 9' and noted the extraneous '11' mark to the far right, which gpt-5-mini incorrectly integrated into its amount reading. Description from gemini-flash is accurate, including the date '24 -' and 'Mr. Steph.'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Stephen Townsend for paving and related work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Stephen Townsend for paving and related work, amounting to £7 8s 9d.

rows.description: 26 - To Mr. Bears for floors &c as per Bills
rows.notes: Visually confirmed description and amounts from gemini-flash. The pence amount is clearly '12' in the ledger. While '12' pence is an invalid value in the £sd system (12d = 1s), it is transcribed as seen. gemini-flash correctly extracted this value and flagged its invalidity, whereas gpt-5-mini misread the pounds, shillings, and pence, likely attempting to normalize the '12' pence. Confidence is moderate due to the unusual ledger entry, but high confidence in the visual transcription.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Bears for floor work and other items as per bills.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Bears for floor work and other items as per bills, amounting to £8 8s 12d.

rows.description: Jul. 26 - Watchman & Lamplighter Xmas Boxes
rows.notes: Amounts are consensual and visually confirmed. Description from gemini-flash is more accurate, correctly reading 'Jul. 26' (not 'Dec: 26') and 'Xmas Boxes' (not '& Mess Boxes').
rows.english_description: Christmas gratuities for the watchman and the lamplighter.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Christmas gratuities for the watchman and the lamplighter, amounting to £0 3s 6d.

rows.description: 13 - Repaid to Mr. Cole. Bursar. on Acc: of the Incroment erroneously stated by him on his Half Yr. Acc. by Omission of Parish Tax St. Cole
rows.notes: Amounts are consensual and visually confirmed. Description from gemini-flash is significantly more accurate, capturing the full detail including the date '13 -', 'Bursar.', 'Incroment', 'Omission', and 'St. Cole' correctly, compared to gpt-5-mini's misinterpretations.
rows.english_description: Repayment to Mr Cole, the bursar, on account of an increment he misstated by omitting parish tax on his half-year account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Repayment to Mr Cole, the bursar, on account of an increment he misstated by omitting parish tax on his half-year account, amounting to £26 3s 0d.

rows.description: 15 - To M. Cooker for Attendance in the library & Half Yrs. Salary
rows.notes: Amounts are consensual and visually confirmed. Description from gemini-flash is significantly more accurate, including the date '15 -', 'M. Cooker', and 'Half Yrs. Salary'. gemini-flash also correctly noted the 'Ford. Cooker' as an attribution to the right, which gpt-5-mini conflated with the main description or misread entirely.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to M. Cooker for attendance in the library and half-year's salary, amounting to £3 3s 0d.
